title: Change the Size of each ITEM for the MAIN TABLE view

posts.author: jonasf (Jonas Fürstenberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I am in need of a VISUAL feature change. Its great for easier and bigger viewing of text and makes it a little bit like EXCEL i suppose.

I would like to have a feature to change the HEIGHT in Pixels of each ITEM element, so I can reach LONG text better on my boards. This would be very helpful. You could then save this as a new view, by saying how many pixels (between 5-30 lets say) each item, so each row.

What are you trying to achieve

I am trying to achieve a better viewing experience for businesses with longer text inputs into their items, as currently it can be a little bit hard to view.
